examples: Their performance was still very ragged.
The five survivors eventually reached safety, ragged, half-starved, and exhausted.
He caught sight of the two little ragged boys behind the green swan-hutch.
Toys "R" Us, the inventor of chain-store toy discounting, is being run ragged by Wal-Mart.
Hedgerow, thick and briary, caught his shirt twice and made it ragged round the elbow.
